title: Add read-only mission-control drilldowns
description: Add read-only drilldown data and TUI views for selected task, agent, and attention items in mission-control, reusing canonical MAP sources and preserving the no-write contract.
acceptance_criteria: Mission-control exposes task, agent, and attention drilldown data derived from existing canonical snapshots/events without recomputing routing or writing state.
The curses TUI provides read-only drilldown navigation for task, agent, event/attention focus while disabled intervention keys remain non-mutating.
Focused mission-control tests, validators, and the full MAP test suite pass.
